mapper.select: /* spUpdWstkkyExcel */ CALL ${apiCommon.schema}.UPD_WSTKKY_EXCEL(#{data.omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR, javaType=String}, #{data.oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER, javaType=Integer})

/* getApiExcelUploadUpdateList */ SELECT WS.STOCKKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.AREAKEY, WS.LOCAKEY, WS.LOLAYER AS STLAYER , WS.SKUGRKY, MGR.GRPKYNM, WS.OWNERKY, WS.SKUDESC, MCO.COMCDTX , WS.ITEMCOD, WS.SKULENG, WS.SKUWEIG, WS.SKUWIDT, WS.SKUTHIC , WS.STKSTAT AS SKUSTAT FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WS INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.MCODEM MCO ON MCO.COMCDKY='ITEMCOD' AND MCO.COMCDVL = WS.ITEMCOD INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.MGRPMA MGR ON MGR.SKUGRKY = WS.SKUGRKY WHERE WS.UPINFST = 'U'
mapper.update: /* updateStockFlag */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY SET UPINFST = 'Y', LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = 'SYS' WHERE UPINFST = 'U'
mapper.select: /* checkSelectionCancelVail */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND TASKSTS IN ('OPERSTR', 'TASKCMP', 'OPERCMP', 'CMP', 'CANCEL')
mapper.update: /* updateApiSelectionCancelForWstkky */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.STOCKKY = WT.STOCKKY AND WS.TASKOKY = WT.TASKOKY AND WS.TASKOIT = WT.TASKOIT SET WS.TASKQTY = 0, WS.LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), WS.LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), WS.LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, WS.UPDTCHK = WS.UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE WT.TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky}

/* updateSelectionStateCancel */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'CANCEL', LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky}
mapper.select: /* getApiSelectionBeforeLocaList */ SELECT WT.TASKOKY, WS.SKUMKEY, WS.AREAKEY as FRAREKY, WS.LOCAKEY as FRLOCKY, WS.LOLAYER as FRLAYER FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT WT INNER JOIN ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WS ON WS.TASKOKY = WT.TASKOKY AND WS.TASKOIT = WT.TASKOIT AND WS.SKUMKEY = WT.SKUMKEY WHERE WT.TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky}
mapper.update: /* updateApiSelectionBeforeLoca */ UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET FRAREKY = #{data.frareky}, FRLOCKY = #{data.frlocky}, FRLAYER = #{data.frlayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateSelectionStart */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'OPERSTR', MVSTDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVSTTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky}
mapper.select: /* getApiLocationStockInfo */ SELECT STOCKKY, WAREKEY, SKUMKEY, AREAKEY, LOCAKEY, LOLAYER as STLAYER , 'N' as RMSTKYN, 'N' as RETUNYN , DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as PHYDTTM FROM ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY WHERE AREAKEY = #{data.areakey} AND LOCAKEY = #{data.locakey} ORDER BY LOLAYER ASC
mapper.update:
/* updateApiWstkky */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WSTKKY SET TASKQTY = 0, AREAKEY = #{data.toareky}, LOCAKEY = #{data.tolocky}, LOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateSelectionTask */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'TASKCMP', TOAREKY = #{data.toareky}, TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky}, TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}

/* updateSelectionCompl */
UPDATE ${apiCommon.schema}.WTAKIT SET TASKSTS = 'CMP', TCMPQTY = 1, TOAREKY = #{data.toareky}, TOLOCKY = #{data.tolocky}, TOLAYER = #{data.tolayer}, MVEDDAT = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), MVEDTIM = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMODATE = date_format(now(), '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(now(), '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{apiCommon.useract}, UPDTCHK = UPDTCHK + 1 WHERE TASKOKY = #{data.taskoky} AND SKUMKEY = #{data.skumkey}
